title: 6 security settings every GitHub maintainer should enable this week
content: GitHub Security Lab recommends six free security settings for maintainers: 1) Add a SECURITY.md file to direct vulnerability reports privately. 2) Enable private vulnerability reporting for confidential disclosures. 3) Turn on secret scanning with push protection to prevent leaked credentials. 4) Enable Dependabot and dependency review to catch vulnerable packages. 5) Turn on code scanning for static analysis of code patterns. 6) Enable branch protection requiring pull request approval before merging. These settings, bundled in the "Protect Your Project" guided flow, close common attack vectors and strengthen entire dependency chains.

title: Pencil 出的设计稿很不错，还原为前端应用有啥经验分享不？
content: A developer struggled to convert Pencil design files into frontend code using multiple AI tools. Attempts with Trae + GLM 5.2, Cursor + Opus 4.8, and Copilot + Opus 4.8 directly reading .pen files failed due to MCP connection issues or poor results. Exporting high-resolution PNG images combined with working Pencil MCP achieved 80-90% accuracy for some pages, but consumed 15,000 credits with only half the project completed. The developer requests GLM 5.5 multimodal support for better design-to-code conversion.

title: Linux 系统依赖包下载平台分享
content: An unemployed system administrator created a self-developed website (deps.itgank.com:8888) for downloading offline Linux dependency packages. The tool addresses challenges in air-gapped environments where systems lack internet and CD-ROM access, making manual installation of software like nginx difficult due to complex dependencies. It supports multiple architectures (x86_64, aarch64) and numerous operating systems including CentOS, Ubuntu, Kylin, openEuler, Debian, Rocky Linux, AlmaLinux, openSUSE, and UOS. The platform uses Kubernetes and Jenkins technologies, requires GitHub login, and sends download links via email.

title: Anthropic 主动遵守中国法律为什么要被骂？
content:
我们要知道，根据中华人民共和国法律《生成式人工智能服务管理暂行办法》 中的： 第二十三条 法律、行政法规规定提供生成式人工智能服务应当取得相关行政许可的，提供者应当依法取得许可。

众所周知 Anthropic 是一家美国企业，根本没有取得大模型服务的备案和行政许可…

title: Rick Rubin on AI, Creativity, and The Way of Code
content: Rick Rubin discusses AI, creativity, and his book *The Way of Code* with a16z hosts. He views AI as a creative tool, not an artist replacement, emphasizing that taste and individual perspective grow more valuable as technology expands possibilities. The conversation covers vibe coding, remix culture, artistic process, entrepreneurship, and collective intelligence. Rubin argues that enduring creative work stems from authenticity rather than audience-pleasing.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Ben Horowitz, Erik Torenberg, Anjney Midha, Rick Rubin)

title: 苹果印度工厂被黑，20万份文件泄露，iPhone 18 Pro全曝完了
content: A cyberattack on Tata Electronics, one of Apple's key manufacturing partners in India, has exposed over 200,000 files (630+ GB) allegedly containing sensitive data from Apple, Tesla, TSMC, and Qualcomm. Leaked materials include unreleased iPhone 18 Pro supplier lists, component details, and drop-test photos. The World Leaks ransomware group claimed responsibility. Tata confirmed a "cybersecurity incident" but said operations were unaffected. Apple is investigating with Tata, which has tightened access controls and hired forensics auditors. The breach highlights growing security risks as India expands its role in global electronics manufacturing.

title: Godot will no longer accept AI-authored code contributions
content: Godot's developers have announced they will no longer accept code contributions generated by artificial intelligence. This policy change reflects growing concerns within open-source communities about AI-authored submissions, including issues related to code quality, licensing ambiguity, and accountability. The decision follows broader industry debates about the implications of AI-generated content in collaborative software development. Hacker News users discussed the announcement, though specific community reactions were not detailed in the provided material.

title: 用 AI 写代码时，你们还逐行看代码吗？
content: The author, despite prior coding experience, no longer reviews AI-generated code line-by-line when using tools like Claude or Codex for internal company tools. Instead, they rely on outcome-based verification: clearly specifying requirements, having AI add test cases, running the application, personally validating business logic, and checking error logs. They verify functional results—such as data accuracy, handling of missing data, retry mechanisms, and duplicate prevention—rather than understanding implementation details. The author prioritizes business outcome comprehension over code comprehension.

title: Anthropic 偷偷在 Claude Code 中植入了隐形代码，只为识别中国用户
content: Anthropic's Claude Code embeds invisible tracking in system prompts to identify Chinese users. It replaces standard Unicode apostrophes (U+0027) with lookalike alternatives and changes date separators from hyphens to slashes when detecting Asia/Shanghai or Asia/Urumqi timezones. These subtle alterations create a 2-3 bit classification marker, allowing Anthropic's servers to flag requests from mainland China without additional detection.

title: 大厂HR破防了：年轻人用Agent找工作，AI辅助面试太离谱
content: Young job seekers increasingly use AI tools to cheat in interviews—real-time transcription, answer generation, and coaching delivered through hidden earpieces or secondary screens. Meanwhile, companies like Amazon, Google, and ByteDance deploy AI for resume screening, automated testing, and behavioral monitoring, creating an "AI versus AI" recruitment battlefield. A gray market of priced interview-assistance services has emerged. The arms race renders traditional interviews unreliable, ultimately disadvantaging honest candidates who prepare without AI aid, and suggests hiring will shift toward practical, in-person evaluations.

His startup's first product, Memoket, is an 11-gram wearable AI memory device that records and structures real-world audio information for retrieval by AI agents. Targeting small business owners and entrepreneurs in Western markets, it emphasizes lightweight, unobtrusive design with 20-hour continuous recording and over 30-day standby. title: Kimi的钱，永远不够花
content: Kimi, a Chinese AI company, raised over $3.9 billion across four funding rounds in six months, with its valuation surging from $4.3 billion to $31.5 billion. The article explains that large language models are capital-intensive businesses requiring continuous investment in GPUs, data centers, and research to avoid falling behind competitors technologically. Kimi's annual recurring revenue reached $300 million by June 2026, with 70% from API developers, marking a shift toward revenue-validated valuations in China's AI sector. Funding now comes primarily from state-backed and sovereign wealth funds viewing AI as strategic infrastructure rather than traditional venture capital seeking short-term returns. Unlike internet platforms, AI companies face rising marginal costs as usage grows, creating permanent funding pressure. Kimi remains private to avoid quarterly scrutiny while scaling revenue, but faces narrowing options for future rounds at ever-higher valuations.

title: AI学习笔记（三）：光模块（概览）
content: Optical modules convert between electrical and optical signals, enabling high-speed, long-distance data transmission via fiber optics. The technology evolves toward higher rates (800G/1.6T), smaller sizes, and lower power consumption. The industry chain follows a profit pyramid: upstream optical/electrical chips command highest margins, while midstream module assembly and downstream applications follow. China dominates global module manufacturing (60%+ share), though foreign firms lead in core chips. Key technologies include pluggable modules (DPO/LPO), near-package optics (NPO), and co-packaged optics (CPO)—the latter being the long-term integration direction. AI computing clusters are driving explosive demand, with 800G modules now mainstream and 1.6T entering mass production.

title: 2026年半年交易总结
content: The author reflects on H1 2026 as the most extreme structural bull market in 32 years of investing. Domestic gold stocks collapsed 60.8% average (5 months) versus 79-81% drops in 2007-2008 and 2014-2015 that took 13-45 months. Despite exiting leveraged positions at January peaks and switching to Hong Kong gold stocks, returns fell from +90% to -9%. Key mistakes: trading illiquid HK shares and prematurely buying newly-listed Zijin Gold International. Lessons: deploy quantitative trading strategies, enforce stop-loss discipline. The author remains committed to mining stocks (Shandong Gold H, Zhaojin Mining, China Gold International) for H2, avoiding leverage amid AI-driven market euphoria.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 人生是历练

title: 如何评价Anthropic最新发布的Claude Sonnet5？
content: Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 5 (codename Fennec), its most capable Sonnet model to date with agent abilities. It matches flagship Opus 4.8 performance and can autonomously plan, use browsers, and terminal tools. Sonnet 5 replaced Sonnet 4.6 as the default model for all Free and Pro users, with significant improvements in reasoning, tool use, programming, and knowledge work.

title: 刚刚，Anthropic发布Sonnet 5，性能接近Opus 4.8，但不一定更便宜
content: Anthropic launched Claude Sonnet 5, its most agentic Sonnet model, featuring improved reasoning, tool use, programming, and knowledge work compared to Sonnet 4.6. Performance approaches Opus 4.8 at lower prices, with broader cost-performance options. The model plans tasks, uses browsers and terminals, and operates more autonomously. It shows improved safety metrics over its predecessor but higher misconduct rates than Opus 4.8. cybersecurity guardrails are enabled by default. Limited-time pricing runs through August 31, 2026 ($2/$10 per million tokens input/output), then increases to $3/$15. Rate limits were raised across platforms.

title: 大规模封号后，Claude 突然发布更便宜的新模型
content: Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 5, a cheaper model with agent capabilities near Opus 4.8 levels, priced at $2/$10 per million tokens for inputs/outputs through August 2026. It features improved tool use, coding, and security but uses a new tokenizer that may increase token counts by up to 35%. The company also launched Claude Science, an AI workbench for researchers integrating scientific tools, databases, and reproducible workflows. Both releases target enterprise and professional markets as Anthropic prepares for IPO amid rapid revenue growth and ongoing user complaints about account bans and high costs.

title: How does a pull-back car work? Illustrated teardown
content: A pull-back car stores energy through a geared mechanism. Pulling the car backward winds a spiral spring via a ratchet. Upon release, the spring unwinds, transferring energy through gears to the wheels. A flywheel smooths power delivery. The drivetrain disengages when the spring fully unwinds, allowing the car to coast. A teardown reveals these components: plastic chassis, spring housing, gear train, axle mounts, and simple clutch mechanism. Friction and gear ratios determine speed and distance traveled.

Apple recently raised iPad and MacBook prices due to rising chip costs, and analysts expect iPhone price increases soon.

title: 郭明錤：苹果寻求采购长鑫存储内存因内存供需缺口持续扩大至明年
content: TF Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo states Apple is lobbying the U.S. government to purchase CXMT memory chips because memory supply shortages will persist until 2027. He estimates 15-20% of consumer electronics memory allocated for 2026 will shift to data centers by 2027, with further growth possible. Due to tight LPDDR supply, actual early procurement of Apple's A20 chip from late 2026 to early 2027 may fall 10-20% below targets.

title: 字节梁汝波全员信：要求管理者主动突破，下沉业务一线
content: ByteDance CEO Liang Rubo issued an all-hands email updating company culture while keeping the mission "Inspire Creativity, Enrich Life." The update emphasizes replacing computation with intelligence to boost creativity and experience. New leadership principles include pursuing high-impact goals, maintaining external perspective, staying close to business operations, and favoring context over control. These principles will anchor manager promotions and evaluations, with demotions for those detached from frontline operations.

title: Claude Mythos 让梁文锋决定融资

Liang is personally contributing $3 billion. The company plans to double its 300-person staff and continues adapting to Huawei chips, causing a 15-month delay in new model releases. DeepSeek remains committed to open-source development, low pricing, and AGI goals. Its V4 model has become the third-largest on Vercel's AI Gateway with 17% token usage, while V4 Flash costs 20-50 times less than Anthropic's alternatives.

content: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 and Haiku 4 models are now generally available on Microsoft Azure, powered by Nvidia Blackwell Ultra GB300 GPUs. The collaboration targets autonomous agent workloads, enabling enterprises to build cross-domain agents using Nvidia-certified skills. Security governance is embedded at the infrastructure level through Nvidia's secure agent workspace reference design, addressing strict data compliance requirements. Anthropic plans further Azure expansion.

title: 有惊喜有隐忧
content: Luzhou Laojiao's products maintain sales without price cuts. Management predicts the liquor industry will enter a normalized destocking cycle by June 2026, with recovery expected in H2 2026-2027. The company pledges share buybacks, no share reductions by major shareholders, and dividends likely exceeding 70% over three years. Inventory sits mainly with dealers; retail and consumer levels are healthy. Seasonal factors and prior policy impacts explain current stock levels. Recent share price pressure from dividend policy fears and fund selloffs is easing.

title: 逆向投资和中石油的复盘
content: The author advocates rational contrarian investing, distinguishing it from mere opposition. In mid-2025, recognizing PetroChina H-shares' undervaluation against CNOOC based on stable natural gas profits, they accumulated positions below 6 HKD post-dividend. After rallies, they rotated to leveraged A-shares in August 2025 when A-shares lagged, later arbitraging the A-H premium by switching to cheaper H-shares and back. They cite Shleifer and Vishny's "Limits of Arbitrage"—arbitrage carries timing risk, external capital pressures, and potential forced liquidations. Oil prices have a shale-cost floor; PetroChina's gas segment provides earnings stability through cost-price dynamics. With China's low rates sustaining dividend demand, they view persistent dividends as central to valuation and reject market efficiency, having repeatedly witnessed mispricings.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 亲爱的阿兰

Google Research developed AI-driven tools to map building-level rooftop reflectivity (albedo) by fusing Sentinel-2 satellite data with 30-cm commercial imagery, achieving high precision validated against airborne measurements. In 2024, they piloted this with 14 cities to guide cool roof interventions. Now they have released an expanded open dataset covering 50+ cities across 9 countries, accessible through the Heat Resilience Earth Engine App, enabling urban planners to prioritize cool-roof retrofits that could reduce urban heat by up to 0.5°C globally.

title: How GitHub maintains compliance for open source dependencies
content: GitHub's Open Source Program Office uses the License Compliance feature to manage thousands of dependencies across its platform. The tool scans pull requests for new dependencies and checks their licenses against organizational policy, flagging noncompliant packages. GitHub migrated from internal tools, initially running in "Evaluate" mode to avoid disrupting developers. A dedicated license policy team reviews exception requests, typically within hours, and can approve licenses at enterprise or repository scope. Emergency overrides exist for critical fixes.
